rooms.name: Town Square
rooms.description: A broad cobbled square sits at the heart of town, built where four districts meet. A fountain burbles beneath strings of civic pennants, and a weathered signpost marks the roads toward the hall, market, temple, and inn.

rooms.name: Town Hall
rooms.description: A sturdy stone hall overlooks the square from a shallow rise, its steps worn smooth by petitions, proclamations, and muddy boots. Ledger clerks move between noticeboards and long benches beneath the town crest.

rooms.name: Town Bank
rooms.description: Thick oak shutters, iron grilles, and neatly stacked ledgers give this chamber a solid, cautious air. The scent of wax and coin hangs over every whisper.

rooms.name: Barracks Yard
rooms.description: A gravel training yard and low barracks building sit just beyond the hall. Spear racks, duty rosters, and boot-scraped flagstones make it clear that the town watch starts and ends its day here.

rooms.name: The Rusty Flagon Inn
rooms.description: A warm common-room glows with hearthlight, supper steam, and the soft noise of regulars trading the day's gossip. Boots dry by the fire, travelers crowd the long tables, and the innkeeper keeps one eye on every cup in the room.

rooms.name: Tavern Loft
rooms.description: A dusty loft above the tavern. Straw mattresses are pushed against the walls. A cracked window overlooks the town square below.

rooms.name: Rosemary Bakery
rooms.description: Heat rolls out from a brick oven that has likely been warm since before dawn. Shelves of fresh loaves, sugared twists, and hand pies fill the room with the kind of smell that can stop a traveler in their tracks.

rooms.name: Common Row
rooms.description: A short lane of plastered cottages and shared stoops runs behind the inn. Laundry lines sway overhead, and every doorway bears its own mixture of flower pots, chopped wood, and watchful curtains.

rooms.name: South Stable
rooms.description: The stable yard is packed hard by hooves and wagon wheels. Horses stamp in their stalls while saddles, feed sacks, and rain-dark tack hang from every post near the gate road.

rooms.name: Town Market
rooms.description: Canvas awnings, chalked price boards, and barrows piled with produce turn this whole lane into the commercial heart of town. Hawkers shout over one another while buyers squeeze between bread stalls, tool carts, and hanging bundles of herbs.

rooms.name: General Store
rooms.description: Shelves packed with lamp oil, rope, kettles, nails, blankets, and a dozen little necessities make this the sort of shop every resident eventually visits. The counter is polished smooth by elbows and barter.

rooms.name: Riverside Apothecary
rooms.description: Shelves packed with labeled jars, bundled herbs, and carefully corked tinctures line every wall. The air smells of camphor, lavender, and bitter roots drying near the back window.

rooms.name: Temple Court
rooms.description: Stone lanterns and shallow steps mark the threshold of the town's oldest sacred quarter. Bells murmur softly above the eaves, and offerings of wax, ribbon, and river flowers line the court in careful rows.

rooms.name: Temple Graveyard
rooms.description: Weathered headstones climb a gentle slope behind the temple, half-shadowed by yew trees and iron fencing. The paths are swept clean despite the moss, and small remembrance candles burn in sheltered niches.

rooms.name: Ruined Shrine
rooms.description: The oldest shrine in town stands roofless and ivy-bound, its altar split by a long-forgotten crack. Even in disrepair, locals still leave charms and folded prayers in the broken stone.

rooms.name: Old Memorial
rooms.description: A ring of carved standing stones surrounds a bronze memorial plaque blackened by age and rain. Fresh flowers and old military badges rest side by side at its base.

rooms.name: Frontier Road
rooms.description: Beyond the town gate, the road narrows into a wind-scoured frontier lane lined with ditch grass, cart ruts, and old boundary stones. The forest gathers darkly ahead.

rooms.name: East Gate
rooms.description: A timber-and-stone gatehouse guards the eastern exit of town. Iron portcullis teeth hang overhead, watch orders are pinned beside the arch, and the road beyond runs straight toward the wilds.

rooms.name: Gate Watchtower
rooms.description: A narrow stair climbs the inside of the eastern watchtower to a platform overlooking the walls, fields, and forest road. Spare lanterns, signal flags, and a spyglass sit ready against the parapet.

rooms.name: Abandoned House
rooms.description: A weather-beaten cottage slumps beside the road behind a leaning fence, its shutters nailed shut and its garden long gone to weeds. The place has stood empty long enough for the town to stop talking about why.

rooms.name: Forest Edge
rooms.description: The last boundary stones of town give way here to roots, hanging vines, and the first dark line of the forest. Strange sounds drift from the canopy ahead, while somewhere below the roadside you can hear cold water moving through hidden stone.

hiddenExitHints.SOUTH: Behind a curtain of hanging vines, you discover a dark cave entrance leading south.
hiddenExitHints.DOWN: Peering over a moss-slick sinkhole hidden among the roots, you spot a narrow descent dropping down toward the cave's heart.

rooms.name: Cave Entrance
rooms.description: A cold draft blows from the yawning darkness ahead. The cave mouth is barely wide enough for one person. Beyond this point, the light from outside will not reach. Something about this place feels draining — you sense your body will not heal naturally here.

rooms.name: Dark Passage
rooms.description: Pitch blackness surrounds you. The air is damp and cold. You can feel passages leading in several directions, but you cannot see which way is safe. Trust your instincts... or suffer the consequences.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: You slam into a solid wall of stone. Pain shoots through your body as you stumble back.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: Your foot catches on a jagged rock and you crash to the ground. The fall leaves you bruised and disoriented.

rooms.name: Dark Passage
rooms.description: The darkness is absolute. Water drips somewhere nearby. You feel passages in multiple directions — a slight breeze from one suggests a way forward.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: You step into empty air and fall several feet before slamming into the ground below.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: Sharp stalactites rake across your arms as you push into a narrow crevice that goes nowhere.

rooms.name: Dark Passage
rooms.description: The stone beneath your feet is slick with moisture. You can hear the distant echo of dripping water from multiple directions.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: The passage narrows to nothing. You scrape against rough stone trying to force your way through.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: You walk face-first into a curtain of wet, slimy moss. Spitting and wiping your face, you retreat.

rooms.name: Dark Passage
rooms.description: The air grows noticeably warmer here. You feel a faint updraft from somewhere below, carrying the scent of minerals.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: A sudden drop! You tumble down a rocky slope, barely managing to claw your way back up.

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: The ceiling collapses to head height, then chest height. You crawl on your belly before realizing there's no way through.

rooms.name: Dark Passage
rooms.description: Something feels different about this place. The darkness seems less oppressive. Is that... a faint glow ahead?

rooms.name: Dark Dead End
rooms.description: You squeeze through a crack only to find yourself in a tiny chamber with no exit. The walls press in claustrophobically.

rooms.name: Heart of the Cave
rooms.description: A shaft of light descends from a hole high above, illuminating a small underground chamber. Crystals embedded in the walls catch the light and scatter it in rainbow hues. A sense of profound peace fills this sacred space. Here, you feel your body can recover once more.

rooms.name: Deep Forest
rooms.description: Huge ancient trees block out the sky. Bioluminescent fungi cast an eerie blue glow across the undergrowth. You feel watched. The path home leads south.

rooms.name: Forest Fork
rooms.description: The trail divides here into two narrow paths that curl between ancient roots and mossy stones. Though the forest is silent, paw prints in the earth suggest that something loyal passed this way not long ago.

hiddenExitHints.EAST: You study the roots, brush aside a wall of brambles, and uncover a narrow hidden path leading east beneath the ancient oak's boughs.

rooms.name: Old Oak Crossing
rooms.description: Beyond the fork, both paths join again in a hidden grove beneath an ancient oak. Sunlight spills through the leaves in golden shafts, illuminating a weathered stone at the tree's roots. A magnificent sword is embedded in the stone. A narrow trail climbs north toward a ruined watch post on the ridge.

rooms.name: Wayfarer's Rest
rooms.description: The ridge path widens into a small shelf of stone ringed by wind-bent grass. A cairn marks the trail back to the grove. The remnants of an older road continue north toward a ruined waystation, while broken switchbacks peel east along the cliff face toward the higher shrine paths.

rooms.name: Ruined Waystation
rooms.description: A roofless stone shelter clings to the ridge, its timbers silvered by weather and old smoke. In the middle stands a squat iron brazier packed with cold ash. From here, the old road can be seen threading back toward the forest below, while a flight of weather-eaten steps climbs east toward the beacon line.

rooms.name: Ridge Switchbacks
rooms.description: A procession of narrow stone cutbacks zigzags up the ridge. Frost-split steps lean toward the drop, and every landing carries scraps of old chalk arrows left for travelers climbing in the dark.

rooms.name: Ribbon Gorge
rooms.description: The trail squeezes through a narrow cut in the ridge where prayer ribbons have been tied from post to post. Small bronze bells knock together overhead whenever the wind surges through the gap.

rooms.name: Scree Walk
rooms.description: A slanted shelf of slate and loose stone skirts the outside of the ridge. The path is broader here, but every few paces boot marks vanish beneath fresh rockfall and windblown gravel.

rooms.name: Beacon Steps
rooms.description: A steep run of carved stairs climbs toward the outer ridge, bracketed by broken stone posts where signal braziers once stood. From this height you can see most of the old watch road unraveling below.

rooms.name: Collapsed Span
rooms.description: Part of the ridge road has sheared away into the valley, leaving only a broken arch, a few replacement planks, and guide ropes tied hard against iron spikes. The wind claws at the gap without pause.

rooms.name: Shrine Approach
rooms.description: The ridge path gathers itself into a ceremonial climb of shallow steps and standing stones. Faded offerings lie in niches cut into the rock, and the shrine ledge waits farther east above the last bend.

rooms.name: Prayer Ledge
rooms.description: A narrow shelf of stone overlooks the valley below. Faded ribbons crack in the wind from a line of branch-posts, and rainwater has pooled in the hollow of an old shrine. Half-hidden beneath the shrine's lip rests an ember lantern sealed against the weather.

rooms.name: Blacksmith's Forge
rooms.description: The heat from the forge is intense. Weapons and armour hang from every hook. A massive blacksmith hammers a glowing sword blade on a thick anvil. A wooden gate to the west leads to the training yard.

rooms.name: Training Yard
rooms.description: A dusty courtyard enclosed by wooden fencing, clearly used for martial practice. Straw-stuffed training dummies stand at attention in a row, their burlap faces scarred from countless strikes. Weapon racks line the perimeter, and a grizzled instructor watches over the area with a critical eye.
